meta.educational_goal: To educate users about type systems in programming languages.

states.label: Idle
evidence: <button id="runDemo" class="demo-button" aria-label="Run Type Checker Demo">Run Type Checker Demo</button>

states.label: Valid Expression Checked
entry_actions: output.textContent = 'Type of validExpr: ' + t1 + '\n\nNow checking invalid expression...';
evidence: output.textContent = 'Type of validExpr: ' + t1 + '\n\nNow checking invalid expression...';

states.label: Checking Invalid Expression

events.description: User clicks the Run Type Checker Demo button.

actions: output.textContent = 'Type of validExpr: ' + t1 + '\n\nNow checking invalid expression...';
expected_observables:
Type of validExpr: Int

Now checking invalid expression...
evidence: output.textContent = 'Type of validExpr: ' + t1 + '\n\nNow checking invalid expression...';

expected_observables: Error detected in invalidExpr: Type error: Both operands to addition must be Int
Error detected in invalidExpr: Type error: Both operands to addition must be Int

evidence: <button id="runDemo" class="demo-button" aria-label="Run Type Checker Demo">Run Type Checker Demo</button>

notes: All interactive elements and event handlers were successfully identified.
State transitions are clearly defined based on button interactions.
The FSM captures the complete flow of the demo functionality.
